lessons.summary: Classify every upload with Dewey Decimal — subject map, keyword rules, then shelf folder textbooks/dewey/{class}/.
steps: write H7 pack with dewey + dewey_label meta

lessons.summary: Build catalog from field drive — scan H7, enrich bibliography, Dewey shelves, war ascertain, atlas passages.
Dispense reading — paginate source text at PAGE_CHARS, route to librarian by Dewey range.
steps: record dispense lesson for owning librarian

lessons.summary: NEXUS install tree catalog — every release file hashed with role + description for incremental updates.
steps: walk install tree with pack-release exclusions

lessons.summary: Upload plain text → pack H7 → Dewey folder — panel POST /api/library/upload.
Every librarian knows every book — title, author, Dewey, description synced to book-knowledge.json.
Librarian issues secure full-page reader — local session token, bookmarks, layout, progress restore.
Lie Librarian — Ironclad Deception Index. Foundation for Autonomous Warfare: every LIKELY_FALSE claim per book, operational assessments.
steps: classify LIKELY_FALSE / UNVERIFIED — verify before fielding
route lies_index / truth_questionable events to vera_lies
